prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名持续上升，2021年第68名→2026年第61名，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力增强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及外卖配送管理争议（中性事件为主），未见重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第38位（较热），短视频平台关注度中等偏上；无投档断档 记录；心理学A、教育学A、马克思主义理论A-，均为A-及以上学科，对相关专业报考有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年相关专业热度：计算机类推荐、 电子信息/通信高热推荐、电气工程及其自动化高热推荐、机械/智能制造分化观望；本省2026年考生总数约609800人，按近年物理类占比约59.8%估算约364660人， 较2025年物理类363040人略有增加，竞争小幅加剧；省控线物理类本科批从2024年448分升至2025年459分，分数线上升反映整体竞争趋紧；西南大学位于重庆（ 非本省），在河北省招生占比约2.3%–2.8%（2021–2025年），属跨省招生，无本省倾斜优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026年计划缩招（-5人）、本省考生略有增加 及省控线上移，在2025年基准37123名基础上预计位次前移（竞争加剧）；预测最低位次约35629名，区间35129–36129名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 29403 → 29282 → 39366 → 32673 → 37123, with significant fluctuations. The 2025 baseline is about 37123. In the recent three years (2023–2025), the ranking moved forward from 39366 to 37123, a cumulative forward shift of about 2243 places, indicating slightly eased competition but with severe volatility. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 95 in 2021, 98 in 2022, 100 in 2023, 72 in 2024, and 86 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 81, a reduction of 5 students (-5.81%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university. The Soft Science main ranking has been rising steadily, from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026, indicating enhanced overall strength. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving disputes over food delivery management (mostly neutral incidents), with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranks 38th (relatively hot), with moderate to high attention on short video platforms. No records of enrollment gaps. Psychology (A), Education (A), and Marxist Theory (A-), all A- or above, are attractive for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, related major popularity: Computer Science recommended, Electronic Information/Communication highly recommended, Electrical Engineering and Automation highly recommended, Mechanical/Intelligent Manufacturing differentiated and wait-and-see. The total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 609,800, with an estimated 364,660 in Physics Category (based on recent proportion of about 59.8%), a slight increase from 363,040 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. The provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch rose from 448 in 2024 to 459 in 2025, reflecting tighter overall competition. Southwest University is located in Chongqing (not in Hebei), with enrollment in Hebei accounting for about 2.3%–2.8% (2021–2025), a cross-provincial enrollment with no local advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering historical ranking fluctuations, the 2026 enrollment reduction (-5 students), a slight increase in provincial examinees, and the upward shift of the provincial control line, based on the 2025 baseline of 37123, the ranking is expected to move forward (competition intensifies). The predicted minimum ranking is about 35629, with a range of 35129–36129.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 35129–36129, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a stretch and Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (<35129), you can focus on competitive majors like Computer Science and Technology, Electrical Engineering and Automation. If your ranking is near the upper bound (>36129), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety. Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering are currently highly recommended majors worth focusing on.

学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university.
